title: How To Make A YouTube Channel (2026)
description:
How to Create a YouTube Channel in 2025 (Step-by-Step for Beginners)
Ready to start your YouTube journey? This quick tutorial walks you through creating your first YouTube channel from scratch—no experience needed.
In this video, you'll learn how to set up your Google account for YouTube, where to find the "Create a channel" option, the difference between personal and Brand Account channels, how to choose your channel name and handle, and how to get your channel ready for your first upload.
Whether you're starting a gaming channel, vlog, business page, or creative project, this guide has you covered.
Subscribe for more YouTube tips and tutorials to help grow your channel!
